title: The Siege of the Banu Tamim in Khurasan
description: According to Abu Ja'far [sc. al-Tabari): In this year 'Abdallah b. Khazim244 besieged the men of Banu Tamim in Khurasan in order to kill those of them who had killed his son Muhammad. According to 'Ali b. Muhammad (al-Mada'ini)-al-kiasan b. Rushayd al-Juzjan1245-al-Tufayl b. Mirdas al `Ammi'246 who [696] said: When the Banu Tamim dispersed in Khurasan during the days of Ibn Khazim, a number of their skilled horsemen-between seventy and eighty-went to the fortress of Fartana.247 They made 'Uthman b. Bishr b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 21
